data.title: A Glimpse Into The Expert Outlook On Helmerich & Payne Through 7 Analysts
What's Going On With Micron Technology Stock Monday?
data.description: Micron shares are moving higher on Monday after President Donald Trump and his administration announced that electronics are exempt from the 145% reciprocal tariffs on Chinese goods.

data.title: Chip Shock: 3 Hot Semiconductor ETFs To Watch As Trump's Tariff Bomb Ticks
data.description: Tariffs on foreign semiconductors may remake supply chains and spook markets. Investors focus on ETFs with heavy chipmaker exposure.

data.title: US-Iran Talks Fuel Oil Rally: Here Are 3 Energy ETFs In The Radar
data.description: Oil prices rise on US-Iran diplomacy and trade war lull, boosting energy ETFs. Companies like ExxonMobil and Chevron benefit. OPEC lowers demand forecast.

data.title: Banking On Less: Truist Trims Price Forecasts For JPMorgan, Wells Fargo After Mixed Signals
data.description: Truist Securities analysts slashed price forecasts for JPMorgan and Wells Fargo following their first-quarter earnings release.
